title: Search Not Returning Results
description: Fix issues when Windows search or Outlook search returns no results or incorrect results.

steps.instruction: Restart the Windows Search Service: Press Win + R, type `services.msc`, find 'Windows Search', right-click, and select Restart.
Rebuild the Search Index: Go to Windows Settings → Search → Searching Windows → Advanced Search Indexer Settings → Advanced → Click 'Rebuild'.
If Outlook search is broken: Close Outlook. Open Control Panel → Indexing Options → Advanced → Rebuild.
Run the built-in Search Troubleshooter: Settings → Update & Security → Troubleshoot → Additional troubleshooters → Search and Indexing.
Restart your computer completely, as pending Windows Updates can sometimes break the search bar UI.
